title: ANC - Changes persist after restarting the device
scenario: ANC Mode and Transparency Mode settings do not persist after device restart
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
3. In Device Settings, locate and expand the ANC tab.
4. Set ANC Mode or Transparency Mode to any value (e.g., High ANC, Low ANC, or Transparency Mode On).
5. Restart the connected Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., press and hold the Power button to turn off, then press again to turn on).
6. Reconnect the device to the Poly Studio Mobile app if necessary.
7. Navigate back to Device Settings → [Device Name] → expand the ANC tab.
8. Observe the current ANC Mode and Transparency Mode settings.
expected: The previously set ANC Mode and Transparency Mode values are retained and displayed correctly after the device restart.
